summary: Tested 1 assertion: VAL-CROSS-002 FAILED. Go test suite has 10 FAIL lines (matches baseline, no regression). Martyr=0 diffs (exact match), Elvis=72 diffs (all cosmetic class renumbering), HungerGames=45 diffs (38 cosmetic, 7 structural — s79F property redistribution, s78V missing text-align:center, s77D missing class, s772 variant split differences), ThreeBelow=12 diffs (all cosmetic). Structural differences are concentrated in Hunger Games table cell and layout styles.
